Class Book

java.lang.Object
Publication
Book
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Book extends Publication
Represents a book entry in the catalogue.

A Book extends Publication with three additional bibliographic fields: author, publisher and genre.

Usage example

Book book = new Book("Clean Code", 2008,
                     "Robert C. Martin", "Prentice Hall", "Programming");
catalogue.addPublication(book);
See Also:

  • Catalogue
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Details

    • Book

      public Book(String title, int year, String author, String publisher, String genre)
      Constructs a new Book with the specified bibliographic data.
      Parameters:
      title - the book title; must not be null
      year - the four-digit publication year
      author - the primary author's full name; must not be null
      publisher - the name of the publishing house
      genre - the literary or thematic genre (e.g. "Fiction", "Science")

  • Method Details

    • getAuthor

      public String getAuthor()
      Returns the author of this book.
      Returns:
      the author's full name; never null

    • setAuthor

      public void setAuthor(String author)
      Sets the author of this book.
      Parameters:
      author - the new author name; must not be null

    • getPublisher

      public String getPublisher()
      Returns the publisher of this book.
      Returns:
      the publisher name

    • setPublisher

      public void setPublisher(String publisher)
      Sets the publisher of this book.
      Parameters:
      publisher - the new publisher name

    • getGenre

      public String getGenre()
      Returns the genre of this book.
      Returns:
      the genre string

    • setGenre

      public void setGenre(String genre)
      Sets the genre of this book.
      Parameters:
      genre - the new genre string

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a detailed string representation of this book.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Publication
      Returns:
      a string in the format Book{title='...', year=..., author='...', publisher='...', genre='...'}
